text:
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: 0 = NDC is not eligible for drug rebate program. (Manufacturer does not have a rebate agreement.) 
Drug meets the definition of a covered outpatient drug (COD), but manufacturer does not participate 
in the rebate program 
1 = NDC is eligible for drug rebate program. NDC is listed on the Medicaid Drug Program (MDP). 
2 = NDC is exempt from the drug rebate program (biological and medical devices). These are 
prescribed drugs that do
